---
title: "Report"
format: 
  html: 
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    embed-resources: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    page-layout: full
---

Your report goes here.

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# a test code chunk
```

## Motivation


## Research Question


## Background
The study will solely analyze business information during 2018.

## Data

### Data Collection


### Data Acquisition


### Data Understanding


## Data Insights


## Conclusions / Big Picture


## Limitations and Future Work
